summary: Nagarik 3 Foundational Layers VERIFIED. All 40 backend API tests passed (100% success). Guardian Network CRUD, Safety Events 9-endpoint API, and Real-Time Event System (WebSocket status) are working correctly. Session lifecycle (start → share-location → session-status → end) tested end-to-end. SOS flow triggers event pipeline and notifies guardian network.

TestGuardianNetworkList.test_list_guardians_returns_200: PASS - Returns guardians array and total count

TestEscalationChain.test_escalation_chain_ordered_by_level: PASS - Chain sorted by priority level
TestEscalationChain.test_escalation_chain_entry_structure: PASS - Each entry has level, type, name, phone, relationship, channels, is_primary, id

TestRiskScore.test_risk_score_has_required_fields: PASS - Returns final_score, risk_level, top_factors, recommended_action

TestSOSTrigger.test_sos_notifies_guardian_network: PASS - Returns guardian_notifications[] and guardians_notified count
TestSOSTrigger.test_sos_different_trigger_types: PASS - All 5 trigger types work: manual, voice, button, shake, auto

rate_limiting_tests.test_share_location_rate_limit_allows_no: PASS - Normal usage not rate limited

TestFullSessionFlow.test_full_session_lifecycle: PASS - Complete flow: start → 3 location updates → status check → end

guardian_network: POST /api/guardian-network/ — Add guardian (parent, friend, sibling, spouse, campus_security, institution)
GET /api/guardian-network/ — List active guardians ordered by priority
GET /api/guardian-network/escalation-chain — Ordered chain with guardians + emergency contacts
safety_events: GET /api/safety-events/session-status — Current session status with risk score
GET /api/safety-events/risk-score — AI risk score with top factors
POST /api/safety-events/sos — Trigger SOS with guardian notifications

critical_code_review_comments: Guardian Network API correctly implements soft delete pattern (is_active=False on DELETE)
Escalation chain combines guardians + emergency contacts ordered by priority level
Safety Events API correctly uses in-memory rate limiting (share-location: 60/min, risk-score: 20/min, safe-route: 10/min)
SOS trigger correctly notifies guardian network and emits real-time events via broadcaster
Session lifecycle properly tracks location_updates count, total_distance_m, and duration_seconds
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed guardians and emergency contacts (auto-cleaned after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: 3 foundational layers verified for Nagarik mobile app: 1) Guardian Network Model - CRUD for guardians (6 types) and emergency contacts (5 types) with escalation chain. 2) Safety Event API - 9 mobile-ready endpoints including session lifecycle, SOS, fake-call, risk-score, safe-route. 3) Real-Time Event System - WebSocket gateway at /api/ws/events?token=<jwt> with event pipeline (emit_sos_triggered, emit_location_update, emit_risk_score_change). Rate limiting uses in-memory storage. Push notifications go through broadcaster only (Redis unavailable). All tests use data-testid attributes where applicable.
